## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New trading strategy
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no behavior change)
- [ ] Test improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My code passes `make lint` and `make type-check`
- [ ] I have added/updated tests for my changes
- [ ] All tests pass (`make test`)
- [ ] I have **not** committed any secrets, API keys, or credentials
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed

### For strategy/execution changes:

- [ ] I have validated changes in paper-trading mode
- [ ] I have added backtest coverage (if applicable)
